# Partial regex matches across an `iota` const block are rejected.
# Splitting only part of an iota sequence is surprising even if values are
# materialised, so users must select the whole block or refactor it manually.

! exec sflit -source big.go -sink small.go -regex '^Kind(A|B)$' -move
stderr 'cannot partially split iota const block'
cmp big.go expected_big.go
! exists small.go

# Copy mode (no -move) is rejected too: a copied implicit spec would render
# as `const KindB` — invalid Go — in the sink.
! exec sflit -source big.go -sink copy.go -regex '^KindB$'
stderr 'cannot partially split iota const block'
cmp big.go expected_big.go
! exists copy.go

-- big.go --
package p

type Kind int

const (
	KindUnknown Kind = iota
	KindA
	KindB
	KindC
	KindD
)
-- expected_big.go --
package p

type Kind int

const (
	KindUnknown Kind = iota
	KindA
	KindB
	KindC
	KindD
)
